heading: Process for establishing motor vehicle pools and transportation systems
label: 603 Process for establishing motor vehicle pools and transportation systems
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)603(a)(1)40:491(b) (related to determination)., title II, § 211(b) (related to determination), (c), (e), as added , ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(c)64 Stat. 583Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1211, § 268 Stat. 1126603(a)(2)40:491(e).603(b)40:491(c).In subsection (b)(1), the words “within ninety days after the effective date of this section” are omitted as obsolete.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)603(a)(1)40:491(b) (related to determination)., title II, § 211(b) (related to determination), (c), (e), as added , ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(c)64 Stat. 583Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1211, § 268 Stat. 1126603(a)(2)40:491(e).603(b)40:491(c).In subsection (b)(1), the words “within ninety days after the effective date of this section” are omitted as obsolete.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Administrator of General Services may carry out section 602 only if the Administrator determines, after consultation with the agencies concerned and with due regard to their program activities, that doing so is advantageous to the Federal Government in terms of economy, efficiency, or service.

children.label: A
children.text: a detailed comparison of estimated costs for present and proposed modes of operation; and

children.label: B
children.text: a showing that savings can be realized by the establishment, maintenance, and operation of a motor vehicle pool or system.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The President shall prescribe regulations establishing procedures to carry out .section 602 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: adequate notice to an executive agency of any determination that affects the agency or its functions;

children.label: B
children.text: independent review and decision as directed by the President of any determination disputed by an agency, with the possibility that the decision may include a partial or complete exemption of the agency from the determination; and

children.label: C
children.text: enforcement of determinations that become effective under the regulations.

children.heading: .—Effect of the regulations
children.label: 3 .—Effect of the regulations
children.text: A determination under subsection (a) is binding on an agency only as provided in regulations issued under this subsection.
